acceptance_checks.given: a project whose resolved host-absolute root is P and the tonberry install template
acceptance_checks.then: the docker -v bind value in .mcpServers.tonberry.args equals P:P:z
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: render tonberry via mcp_install.sh under setup_fake_docker_for_oci; assert jq -r (args|index("-v") as $i|.[$i+1]) == "$PWD:$PWD:z"

acceptance_checks.then: the docker -w value in .mcpServers.tonberry.args equals P (never the literal /workspace)
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: assert jq -r (args|index("-w") as $i|.[$i+1]) == "$PWD" (catches non-global substitution)

acceptance_checks.then: no arg contains the literal token /workspace
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: ! jq -e (.mcpServers.tonberry.args[]|select(type=="string" and test("/workspace"))); teeth: reverting template to :/workspace:z turns this RED (the check that would have caught #507)

acceptance_checks.given: a project whose resolved host-absolute root is P and the atomos install template
acceptance_checks.then: the docker -v bind value in .mcpServers.atomos.args equals P:P:z
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: render atomos via mcp_install.sh; assert jq -r (args|index("-v") as $i|.[$i+1]) == "$PWD:$PWD:z"

acceptance_checks.then: the docker -w value in .mcpServers.atomos.args equals P
no arg contains the literal token /workspace
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: ! jq -e (.mcpServers.atomos.args[]|select(type=="string" and test("/workspace"))); teeth: pre-fix atomos template turns this RED

acceptance_checks.when: cli/templates/mcp/atlas-aci.mcp.json.tmpl is inspected and diffed against base
acceptance_checks.then: it still binds __PROJECT_ROOT__:/repo:ro and still passes serve --repo /repo, and the atlas-aci template is absent from the change diff
acceptance_checks.verify_method: grep: template still contains __PROJECT_ROOT__:/repo:ro and /repo; git diff --name-only base..head does not list the atlas-aci template

acceptance_checks.then: it has zero modified lines (mcp_driver_oci_image_assess still uses ${project_root}:/workspace:ro, -w /workspace, literal assess /workspace)
acceptance_checks.verify_method: cmd: git diff --name-only base..head does not list cli/src/lib_mcp.sh; grep confirms the assess -v/-w/positional block byte-identical

acceptance_checks.given: tonberry (or atomos) already installed into a project at a fixed digest
acceptance_checks.when: eidolons mcp install <name> runs a second time with the same digest
acceptance_checks.then: the resulting .mcp.json is byte-identical to the first run and the existing MCP bats suite stays green
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: existing MCP suite (mcp_install.bats, mcp_wiring.bats, mcp_assess.bats) stays green; diff of .mcp.json after two installs is empty

acceptance_checks.given: the change touches only the two templates, a bats test, and CHANGELOG (no cli/src/*.sh edit)
acceptance_checks.then: shellcheck -x -S error over cli exits 0, bash 3.2 compatibility is preserved, and git diff lists no cli/src/*.sh file
acceptance_checks.verify_method: cmd: make lint exits 0; git diff --name-only base..head lists no cli/src/*.sh file
